title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Jeff Su presents a workspace architecture system called Claude Cowork that transforms Claude into an operating system for work. The system includes CLAUDE.md instruction files, persistent memory, a three-level hierarchy of workstations and projects, and practical use cases like email management and newsletter drafting.
